description_long: This is a modern, compact rifle with a distinctive gold finish and black accents, featuring a skeletonized stock and a prominent pistol grip. The body is angular and streamlined, with visible screws and mechanical details along the receiver and handguard. The rifle is equipped with flip-up iron sights mounted on a Picatinny rail, and the magazine is inserted into the lower receiver, typical of submachine gun or carbine designs. The barrel is short and ends flush with the handguard, with no visible muzzle device attached. The stock is skeletonized and appears to be fixed, providing a lightweight yet sturdy support. The overall design suggests a tactical firearm suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A gold and black compact tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, flip-up iron sights, and a short barrel, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold body, black skeletonized stock, pistol grip, and flip-up iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, narrow profile, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine well, gold receiver, and the full length of the stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the black buttpad of the skeletonized stock and the compact width of the rifle.
